title: Different behaviour between buildx --target and podman --target
body:
### Issue Description

```
docker build https://github.com/helmwave/helmwave --target release
```

Threre are multiple targets mentioned in the Dockerfile like 

```
goreleaser
release
etc.
```

But the meaning of the --target here is not to build serially to a stage after which to stop, but instead to only build that stage along with its dependents

Hence here, since release depends on only builder only that part of the Dockerfile is built, while podman on the other hand builds serially to a stage.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman build https://github.com/helmwave/helmwave --target release


### Describe the results you received

Error: error building at STEP "COPY helmwave /bin/": checking on sources under "/home/jenkins/helmwave": copier: stat: "/helmwave": no such file or directory

### Describe the results you expected

```
=> CACHED [internal] load git source https://github.com/helmwave/helmwave.git                                                                                                                                                                  0.7s
 => [internal] load metadata for docker.io/library/alpine:3.18                                                                                                                                                                                  0.0s
 => [internal] load metadata for docker.io/library/golang:1.21-alpine3.18                                                                                                                                                                       0.0s
 => [builder 1/7] FROM docker.io/library/golang:1.21-alpine3.18                                                                                                                                                                                 0.0s
 => CACHED [base-release 1/2] FROM docker.io/library/alpine:3.18                                                                                                                                                                                0.0s
 => CACHED [builder 2/7] WORKDIR helmwave                                                                                                                                                                                                       0.0s
 => [base-release 2/2] RUN apk --update --no-cache add ca-certificates && update-ca-certificates                                                                                                                                                1.1s
 => [builder 3/7] COPY go.mod go.sum ./                                                                                                                                                                                                         0.1s
 => [builder 4/7] RUN go mod download                                                                                                                                                                                                          13.1s
 => [builder 5/7] COPY cmd cmd                                                                                                                                                                                                                  0.0s 
 => [builder 6/7] COPY pkg pkg                                                                                                                                                                                                                  0.1s 
 => [builder 7/7] RUN go build -a -o /helmwave ./cmd/helmwave                                                                                                                                                                                  39.5s 
 => [release 1/1] COPY --from=builder /helmwave /bin/                                                                                                                                                                                           0.4s 
 => exporting to image                                                                                                                                                                                                                          0.5s 
 => => exporting layers                                                                                                                                                                                                                         0.5s 
 => => writing image sha256:fa0f7571844c0a3e88e6a6002cab0b980adaed7f1bae0705cc6033ecabeabb3e 
```
